mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_member (group_id, user_key, role, status, joined_at) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{userKey}, #{role}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_key = #{userKey} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT g.group_id as groupId, g.name, g.description, g.leader_user_key as leaderUserKey, g.capacity, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_member gm WHERE gm.group_id = g.group_id AND gm.status = 'ACTIVE') as currentMemberCount, g.auto_approve as autoApprove, g.schedule_policy as schedulePolicy, g.def_sub_can_schedule as defSubCanSchedule, g.def_sub_can_member as defSubCanMember, g.def_sub_can_nickname as defSubCanNickname, g.created_at as createdAt, g.updated_at as updatedAt FROM `group` g JOIN group_member m ON m.group_id = g.group_id WHERE m.user_key = #{userKey} AND m.status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT role FROM group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_key = #{userKey} AND status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1
SELECT group_id as groupId, user_key as userKey, role, status, joined_at as joinedAt, left_at as leftAt FROM group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY joined_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE group_member SET status = #{status}, left_at = NOW() WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_key = #{userKey}
